recommendations.title: It! The Terror from Beyond Space
recommendations.overview: The first manned expedition to Mars is invaded by an unknown life form, which stows away on the rescue ship.

recommendations.title: Stowaway
recommendations.overview: A three-person crew on a mission to Mars faces an impossible choice when an unplanned passenger jeopardizes the lives of everyone on board.

recommendations.title: Alpha
recommendations.overview: Alpha, a troubled 13-year-old lives with her single mom. Their world collapses the day she returns from school with a tattoo on her arm.

recommendations.title: Forbidden Planet
recommendations.overview: Starship C57D travels to planet Altair 4 in search of the crew of spaceship "Bellerophon," a scientific expedition that has been missing for twenty years. They find themselves unwelcome by the expedition's lone survivor and warned of destruction by a

recommendations.title: Life
recommendations.overview: The six-member crew of the International Space Station is tasked with studying a sample from Mars that may be the first proof of extra-terrestrial life, which proves more intelligent than ever expected.

recommendations.title: Moon Man
recommendations.overview: Working as a maintenance crew member on the moon, Duguyue is left behind after the evacuation mission forgets about him. A meteorite then destroys planet Earth, leaving him as the only man left alive in existence.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Waters of Mars
recommendations.genres: Horror, Science Fiction, Drama, Mystery, Adventure, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: In a Mars base, the inhabitants are being infected by a mysterious water creature which takes over its victims. The Doctor is thrust into the middle of this catastrophe, knowing a larger one is waiting around the corner.

recommendations.title: Europa Report
recommendations.overview: A crew of international astronauts are sent on a private mission to Jupiter's fourth moon.

recommendations.title: RocketMan
recommendations.overview: An accident-prone and obnoxious geek joins a NASA space mission to Mars. During the flight, he manages to put himself and the entire crew in jeopardy, but is in danger of emerging as a hero when his new colleagues need him to save them from the unfor

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: The Raven Chaser
